name: stdlib-shadow-preflight
description: Startup preflight detects stdlib-shadowing backport packages (typing, asyncio, ...) and exits with an actionable message instead of a raw traceback (issue #32)

steps.title: Setup: throwaway venv with a stdlib-shadowing backport

steps.description: Poison a throwaway venv with a typing backport, then launch kollab through it
steps.command: set -u; ROOT=$(mktemp -d); VENV="$ROOT/venv"; python3 -m venv --without-pip "$VENV" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'PREFLIGHT_TEST: venv creation failed'; exit 0; }; SP=$(echo "$VENV"/lib/python*/site-packages); if [ ! -d "$SP" ]; then echo 'PREFLIGHT_TEST: site-packages not found'; rm -rf "$ROOT"; exit 0; fi; printf 'raise ImportError("Python 2 typing backport: incompatible with this interpreter")\n' > "$SP/typing.py"; OUT=$("$VENV/bin/python" "$PWD/main.py" smoke 2>&1); RC=$?; rm -rf "$ROOT"; echo '----- kollab launch output -----'; echo "$OUT"; echo "----- PREFLIGHT_EXIT=$RC -----"

steps.title: Test 1: actionable message naming the offender
Test 3: clean exit, no raw traceback

steps.description: No false positive in a clean interpreter
